---
title: "Kwai"
platform_slug: "kwai"
sources:
  ugc:
    BR: data/global/kwai/ugc.yml
    EU: data/global/kwai/ugc.yml
    UK: data/global/kwai/ugc.yml
  ads:
    BR: data/global/kwai/ads.yml
    EU: data/global/kwai/ads.yml
    UK: data/global/kwai/ads.yml
---

Kwai provides no transparency resource for either user-generated content or advertising. Only third-party scraping-based APIs exist, which fall outside the scope of this assessment. It also does not have any graphical interface for data access, and it does not operate an advertising repository. A brief political-ad transparency tool launched in Brazil was [discontinued within approximately one month of its launch](https://desinformante.com.br/kwai-anuncios-politicos/). With no data transparency resource, all secondary criteria returned negative answers. Both frameworks therefore produce a score of zero, placing Kwai in the Not Available band, rendering independent research into platform data and advertising infeasible under the conditions assessed.

## Transparency Assessment


```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
import sys
from pathlib import Path
project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))
from utils.responses_aggregator import generate_platform_question_sections
```

```{python}
#| label: platform-summary
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from utils.platform_summary import generate_platform_summary
generate_platform_summary("kwai")
```




## User-Generated Content

```{python}
#| label: ugc-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="kwai",
    question_type="ugc",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```

## Advertising

```{python}
#| label: ads-questions
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
generate_platform_question_sections(
    platform="kwai",
    question_type="ads",
    year="2025",
    heading_level=3,
)
```
